title: Hiring Medical Officer at RML Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at RML Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at RML Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Medical Officer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About RML Hospital:
RML Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital!
